title: cedrela hassleri
intro: Cedrela hassleri, also known as the West Indian cedar or Panama cedar, is a tropical tree species native to Central and South America. The tree has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, attributed to the presence of essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cedrela hassleri include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as potential antimicrobial and antifungal effects. Herbal preparations of Cedrela hassleri are typically made from its leaves, bark, or essential oils, and can be used in various forms, including teas, infusions, and topical applications.
